hold_short_side_blocker_reason: Short-side execution is not supported in the current replay simulator without core runner changes. Independent short entries cannot be represented truthfully. First pass is long-only only.

regime_scope.freshness_note: Offline calibrated regime labels are estimated=true; freshness assumed true for all candles in controlled-lab context.

hypothesis: In RANGE regime (low ADX, mean-reverting price action), BTCUSDT prices revert to short-term central tendency. Entering contrarian long positions at negative z-score extremes (oversold) and exiting at mean reversion (z-score crosses zero) can produce positive net expectancy given controlled friction costs. First pass is long-only due to HOLD_SHORT_SIDE_BLOCKER.
risk_assumptions: Core Risk Service, kill-switch, and LR gates remain authoritative.
Candidate evidence cannot override runtime risk blocks.
Mean reversion in low-volume regime transitions may produce extended losses if regime shifts to TREND mid-trade.
execution_assumptions: Fees, spread, and slippage are simulated via ExecutionSimulator.
Existing MEXC same-venue multi-window data is used for file-backed replay.
Backtest and controlled-lab evidence do not imply live execution readiness.
Long-only first pass: short-side not supported in this slice.

unsafe_zones.reason: LR remains NO-GO and this contract is research-only.
Mean reversion positions held during TREND or HIGH_VOL_CHAOTIC regime transitions may produce extended adverse moves.
Short-side execution not supported in this first pass. Original long_short direction is deferred.

limitations: No productive DB registry is created by this artifact.
Parameter set is initial research estimate; requires calibration from replay evidence.
RANGE regime detection uses existing ADX-based offline heuristic regime labels.
Long-only first pass only; short-side blocked.
